task_description: retrieve weather data for twenty major cities, compute average temperature by continent, save all responses to JSON, and print the warmest continent
code:
echo "London, UK" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, UK/, Europe/' cities.txt
echo "Berlin, Germany" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, Germany/, Europe/' cities.txt
echo "Madrid, Spain" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, Spain/, Europe/' cities.txt
echo "Paris, France" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, France/, Europe/' cities.txt
echo "Tokyo, Japan" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, Japan/, Asia/' cities.txt
echo "Delhi, India" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, India/, Asia/' cities.txt
echo "Shanghai, China" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, China/, Asia/' cities.txt
echo "Sao Paulo, Brazil" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, Brazil/, South America/' cities.txt
echo "Mexico City, Mexico" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, Mexico/, North America/' cities.txt
echo "Sydney, Australia" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, Australia/, Oceania/' cities.txt
echo "Lagos, Nigeria" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, Nigeria/, Africa/' cities.txt
echo "Cairo, Egypt" >> cities.txt
sed -i 's/, Egypt/, Africa/' cities.txt
